name: bruff
description: A modern JavaScript/TypeScript roguelike game collection with focus on functional programming patterns and type safety.
author: Duncan Kolba <duncankolba@gmail.com>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bruff/game run build && pnpm --filter @bruff/arcade run build:site
scripts.format: pnpm run format:ai && pnpm -r --parallel run format
scripts.ok: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
